race.comment: CACCHIONE (2) was just fair last time at Pakenham Synthetic, his first go on an all-weather surface, but had been coming along well prior in much stronger maidens. Fancy he'll be better for that experience and back to 1000m should suit much better anyway. TENNESSEE SPIRIT (11) didn't handle the heavy 10 at Wangaratta but had been close up in town fresh. This suits nicely, she should be bouncing back. BLACKHILL BOY (1) resuming today but will be fitter for a recent trial, rates a place chance. MAKATI (3) three-year-old gelding who was purchased for AUD $ 15,000 (Inglis 2023 Great Southern Sale) out of the stakes performer Moon De French. Won a recent jumpout. Watch the betting.
